name: From Geneva: day trip to the chocolate factory, watch museum and Neuchâtel Castle
description: Discover From Geneva: day trip to the chocolate factory, watch museum and Neuchâtel Castle in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover From Geneva: day trip to the chocolate factory, watch museum and Neuchâtel Castle in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Day trips
subcategory.description: Find and book a day trip by bus through beautiful Swiss landscapes. Get on and let's go. You don't have to worry about any tedious organization on a day trip and can instead enjoy the ride to the fullest while being chauffeured to your excursion destination. Switzerland's well-developed road network allows excursions to all popular places and natural beauties

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Neuchâtel: impressive architectural detail of watchmaking during a day trip
Chocolate: Delicious ingredient for cooking and baking adventures in your free time with friends.
Watches: Close-up of a mechanical watch movement with intricate craftsmanship and precise gears.
Lake Geneva: picturesque vineyard landscape with views of the mountains and the lake on the day trip.
Lake Geneva: Idyllic vineyards with a view of Lavaux and the Bernese Alps, ideal for day trips.
Neuchatel Castle: impressive architecture in Neuchatel, surrounded by nature and historical elements.
